David Buck Weddings is a Vancouver-based team specializing in wedding photography, videography, and drone services. They capture real, unscripted, and joy-filled moments with a focus on natural posing and cinematic storytelling. Their comprehensive packages include custom albums and wall art to preserve your wedding memories beautifully.
